name: EFAS - Eigen Forecasting & Analysis System
description: Physics-informed time-series forecasting using eigenmode decomposition for construction and building operations predictions. Unlike black-box ML models, EFAS decomposes time-series data into fundamental eigenmodes (oscillatory patterns) with physical interpretability, enabling explainable AI for construction forecasting.

before.method: Heuristics-based estimates and black-box ML models

after.dataEfficiency: Requires less training data than deep learning

value.taktTimeForecasting: Predict zone completion with +/-2 day confidence interval
value.equipmentLifespan: Predict failure date with +/-30 day confidence interval
value.scheduleDelayPropagation: Forecast downstream impacts with consequence chain analysis

milestones.name: Core Forecasting Engine
milestones.description: Implement Dynamic Mode Decomposition (DMD), SVD with GPU acceleration, bootstrap confidence intervals, and accuracy metrics

milestones.name: CaaS Integration
milestones.description: Takt time forecasting, schedule delay propagation, resource optimization

milestones.name: Siltana Integration
milestones.description: Equipment degradation models, energy consumption forecasting, sensor anomaly detection

milestones.name: Advanced Forecasting
milestones.description: Multi-variate forecasting, scenario planning, real-time streaming DMD, explainable AI dashboard
